mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recipe_likes (user_id, recipe_id, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{recipeId}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM recipe_likes WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND recipe_id = #{recipeId}
mapper.update: UPDATE recipes SET like_count = like_count + 1 WHERE id = #{recipeId}
UPDATE recipes SET like_count = like_count - 1 WHERE id = #{recipeId}
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM recipe_likes WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND recipe_id = #{recipeId}
